invitation.description: To accept the invitation, please sign in to your account or create a new one.

invitation.declined: You have declined the invitation to join {{organizationName}}. You will not have access to the organization's resources.
invitation.chooseYourOrgDesc: You are a member of multiple organizations. Please select the one you want to access.
invitation.createNewOrganization: You can create a new organization to get started.
invitation.provideNameToCreateOrg: Provide a name to create your organization.
invitation.failedToCreateOrganization: Failed to create organization. Please try again.
invitation.failedToAcceptInvitation: Failed to accept invitation. Please try again.
invitation.failedToDeclineInvitation: Failed to decline invitation. Please try again.

requestsPage.title: Assignment Requests

details.userNotFoundInCryptlexDescription: The invited user has not yet accepted the invitation. Therefore, no license can be assigned yet.
details.changeRoleDescription: Changing the role of a member will affect their permissions within the organization. Please review the role permissions before confirming the change.

revitProjectBoxPage.licenseKeyReleasedDescription: To release a license key it must be deactivated on a local machine
